ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enabling this will insert the text at the end of the section & its subsections, rather than just at the end of the target section.A section is defined by a heading, and its subsections are all the headings inside that section.
ast.target: Enabling this will insert the text at the end of the section & its subsections, rather than just at the end of the target section.A section is defined by a heading, and its subsections are all the headings inside that section.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 显示高级设置，如温度、top p 和频率惩罚。
ast.target: 显示高级设置，如温度、top p 和频率惩罚。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 采样温度。高值如0.8输出更随机，低值如0.2更集中。默认1。
ast.target: 采样温度。高值如0.8输出更随机，低值如0.2更集中。默认1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 核采样 - 温度替代。考虑top_p概率质量。0.1表示前10%。默认1。
ast.target: 核采样 - 温度替代。考虑top_p概率质量。0.1表示前10%。默认1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 正值会根据新词元在当前文本中的出现频率进行惩罚，降低模型逐字重复同一行的可能性。默认值为 0。
ast.target: 正值会根据新词元在当前文本中的出现频率进行惩罚，降低模型逐字重复同一行的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 正值会根据新词元是否已出现在当前文本中进行惩罚，提高模型谈论新话题的可能性。默认值为 0。
ast.target: 正值会根据新词元是否已出现在当前文本中进行惩罚，提高模型谈论新话题的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This prevents the plugin from making requests to external providers like OpenAI. You can still use User Scripts to execute arbitrary code, inclulding contacting external providers. However, this setting disables plugin features like the AI Assistant from doing so. You need to disable this setting to use the AI Assistant.
ast.target: This prevents the plugin from making requests to external providers like OpenAI. You can still use User Scripts to execute arbitrary code, inclulding contacting external providers. However, this setting disables plugin features like the AI Assistant from doing so. You need to disable this setting to use the AI Assistant.
